summary: Verified email sending 5-point fix. All backend tests pass (8/8). Frontend thread page correctly displays Email Mode banner when navigated with mode=email param. API fallback for email retrieval works. NDA page accessible.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Contact not found' and 500 errors when loading some conversations - contact_id may not match actual contact record

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email sending fix verified working. All 5 fixes confirmed: 1) Mode initialization no longer silently falls back to SMS when mode=email is passed. 2) email_work field is checked in addition to email. 3) Action modes (review/card/congrats) no longer force SMS. 4) Conversation ID race condition handled safely. 5) Search/tasks/contact-detail navigation paths all include contact_email param. Backend APIs: conversation info returns contact_email, conversations list includes email in contact object, email send returns resend_id. Frontend verified: Email Mode banner displays when navigating with mode=email, Switch to Email works via API fallback.
